ability-1.name: 恶臭

ability-6.name: 湿气

ability-12.name: 迟钝

ability-13.name: 无关天气

ability-253.description: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

ability-254.name: 游魂
ability-254.description: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.

ability-255.name: 一猩一意
ability-255.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

ability-256.name: 化学变化气体
ability-256.description: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.

ability-257.name: 粉彩护幕
ability-257.description: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.

ability-258.name: 饱了又饿
ability-258.description: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode

ability-259.name: 速击
ability-259.description: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

ability-260.name: 无形拳
ability-260.description: Contact moves can strike through Protect/Detect.

ability-261.name: 怪药
ability-261.description: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.

ability-264.name: 苍白嘶鸣
ability-264.description: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

ability-265.name: 漆黑嘶鸣
ability-265.description: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

ability-268.name: Lingering Aroma
ability-268.description: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

ability-269.name: Seed Sower
ability-269.description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

ability-270.name: Thermal Exchange
ability-270.description: Raises Attack when hit by a Fire-type move. Cannot be burned.

ability-271.name: Anger Shell
ability-271.description: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.

ability-272.name: Purifying Salt
ability-272.description: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.

ability-273.name: Well-Baked Body
ability-273.description: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.

ability-274.name: Wind Rider
ability-274.description: Gives immunity to wind moves, and causes the Pokémon's Attack to increase by one stage when hit by one.

ability-275.name: Guard Dog
ability-275.description: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.

ability-277.name: Wind Power
ability-277.description: When hit by a wind move, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.

ability-278.name: Zero to Hero
ability-278.description: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.

ability-279.name: Commander
ability-279.description: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.

ability-280.name: Electromorphosis
ability-280.description: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.

ability-281.name: Protosynthesis
ability-281.description: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.

ability-282.name: Quark Drive
ability-282.description: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.

ability-284.name: Vessel of Ruin
ability-284.description: Lowers Special Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

ability-285.name: Sword of Ruin
ability-285.description: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

ability-286.name: Tablets of Ruin
ability-286.description: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

ability-287.name: Beads of Ruin
ability-287.description: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

ability-288.name: Orichalcum Pulse
ability-288.description: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.

ability-289.name: Hadron Engine
ability-289.description: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.

ability-290.name: Opportunist
ability-290.description: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.

ability-291.name: Cud Chew
ability-291.description: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.

ability-293.name: Supreme Overlord
ability-293.description: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.

ability-294.name: Costar
ability-294.description: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.

ability-295.name: Toxic Debris
ability-295.description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

ability-296.name: Armor Tail
ability-296.description: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.

ability-297.name: Earth Eater
ability-297.description: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.

ability-298.name: Mycelium Might
ability-298.description: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.

ability-299.name: 心眼
ability-299.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

ability-300.name: 甘露之蜜
ability-300.description: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

ability-301.name: 款待
ability-301.description: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.

ability-302.name: 毒锁链
ability-302.description: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.

ability-304.name: 太晶变形
ability-304.description: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.

ability-305.name: 太晶甲壳
ability-305.description: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

ability-306.name: 归零化境
ability-306.description: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.

ability-307.name: 毒傀儡
ability-307.description: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.

ability-308.name: Piercing Drill
ability-308.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.

ability-309.name: Dragonize
ability-309.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

ability-310.name: Mega Sol
ability-310.description: The Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

ability-311.name: Spicy Spray
ability-311.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
